title: 3.2 practice
description: Practice what you learned in lesson 3.2.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What was it about the egg that made it critical to the advancement of life on Earth?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: It allowed animals to move permanently onto land, where they continued to evolve and grow more complex.
It aided in the development of photosynthesis in land-dwelling organisms.
It made flight possible by allowing birds to raise their young in the safety of trees.
It allowed mammals to establish themselves as the dominant life-form on our planet.

assessment_items.question_content:
**The fifth threshold of increasing complexity is life on Earth. Which of the following is one of the Goldilocks Conditions for life?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Locations of higher density in the Universe and gravity
Increasing abundance of heavier elements in regions of star formation

assessment_items.question_content:
**All living things on Earth share important processes. What are those four processes?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: Aerobic respiration, Anaerobic respiration, photosynthesis, metabolism

assessment_items.question_content:
**What ingredient(s) are seen as necessary for the creation of life?
**

[[☃ radio 1]]
